description: Letter sent from Alexandria by Zikrī b. Ḥananʾel to ʿArūs b. Yosef in Fustat. It is a copy of a previous letter informing the recipient that the writer had already 'ascended' to al-Mahdiyya and was expecting to receive instructions as to whether or not he should carry the merchandise with him. Dated ca. 1080. (Information from Gil, and from Mediterranean Society, I, pp. 313, 314)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית לפוסטאט. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
